Privacy Policy

Your privacy is important to us.

We may collect basic information such as your name, email address, browser type, and website usage data to improve our services.

This website may use cookies to enhance user experience.

Third-party advertising services, including Google AdSense, may use cookies to serve personalized advertisements.

We do not sell or share your personal information with third parties except when required by law.

By using this website, you agree to this Privacy Policy.
